{"credits": [{"type": "analyst", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/441098?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/unknownhad/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/unknownhad/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/unknownhad/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/unknownhad/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/unknownhad", "id": 441098, "login": "unknownhad", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjQ0MTA5OA==", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/unknownhad/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/unknownhad/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/unknownhad/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/unknownhad/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/unknownhad/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/unknownhad", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-50135", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:A/VC:H/VI:N/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-59", "name": "Improper Link Resolution Before File Access ('Link Following')"}], "description": "**Commit:** [f8b5fa09a6](https://github.com/gohugoio/hugo/commit/f8b5fa09a6) — _Fix prevention of direct symlink reads in resources.Get_
**Affected versions:** v0.123.0 through v0.161.1. Earlier versions are not affected.
**Fixed in:** v0.162.0.
**Severity:** Medium. Requires the attacker to be able to place (or convince a site author to place) a symlink inside a mounted directory — for example, inside a locally-vendored theme under `themes/`. Themes mounted as Go modules from GitHub have symlinks stripped on download and are not affected. Multi-directory walks (e.g. content/asset walking) were not affected either; only direct lookups via `resources.Get` followed symlinks.

**Description.** Hugo's virtual filesystem is designed so that files under a mount cannot reach outside the mount tree. A regression introduced in v0.123.0 caused `RootMappingFs.statRoot` to call `Stat` (which follows symlinks) instead of `Lstat`, so a direct `resources.Get "somefile"` where `somefile` was a symlink pointing outside the mount would return the target's contents. This effectively let a symlink planted inside a theme or local mount read arbitrary files reachable to the user running `hugo`.

**Mitigation.** v0.162.0 calls `LstatIfPossible` and rejects symlinked entries with `os.ErrNotExist`, matching the behaviour of pre-v0.123.0 releases and of the directory-walking code paths.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00275, "percentile": 0.19334}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-fw87-fv5r-9fpw", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-16T20:12:34Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fw87-fv5r-9fpw", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-fw87-fv5r-9fpw"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-50135"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-16T20:12:34Z", "references": ["https://github.com/gohugoio/hugo/security/advisories/GHSA-fw87-fv5r-9fpw", "https://github.com/gohugoio/hugo/commit/f8b5fa09a64950c32b803821ede411ebfe772b7a", "https://github.com/gohugoio/hugo/releases/tag/v0.162.0", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fw87-fv5r-9fpw"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/gohugoio/hugo/security-advisories/GHSA-fw87-fv5r-9fpw", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/gohugoio/hugo", "summary": "Hugo: Symlink confinement bypass in resources.Get", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-16T20:12:35Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-fw87-fv5r-9fpw", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.162.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/gohugoio/hugo"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 0.123.0, < 0.162.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Hugo: Symlink confinement bypass in resources.Get
